Container.Name: whisper-cpp-openai
Container.Overview: All-in-one OpenAI-compatible Whisper transcription server. Runs whisper.cpp's whisper-server (compiled for Sapphire Rapids — AMX_INT8/BF16 kernels) and the FastAPI shim under tini supervision in a single container. Endpoints: POST /v1/audio/transcriptions, POST /v1/audio/translations, GET /v1/models. Returns OpenAI-shape responses including a normalized verbose_json. Model auto-downloads to the configured volume on first start.
Container.Requires: AMX-capable CPU (Sapphire Rapids or Granite Rapids — Xeon 6xxx). Will SIGILL on older CPUs.

Config.Name: Models
Config.Description: Where ggml whisper models are cached. ~3GB per model. Persists across restarts.

Config.Name: WHISPER_MODEL
Config.Description: ggml model. Options: tiny, base, small, medium, large-v1, large-v2, large-v3, large-v3-turbo (and *.en variants).

Config.Name: WHISPER_THREADS
Config.Description: Threads per inference. With AMX, returns diminish past ~8-16 threads.

Config.Name: WHISPER_LANGUAGE
Config.Description: Default language; auto = detect per request.

Config.Name: WHISPER_MODEL_NAME
Config.Description: What this server advertises in /v1/models. Leave blank to use WHISPER_MODEL value.

Config.Name: SHIM_API_KEY
Config.Description: If set, requires Authorization: Bearer <key> on every request. Empty = open.
